title: orchis lingua
intro: Orchis lingua, also known as the tongue orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Orchis lingua include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
